I have been using this app for the past five years; PhonePe has become an integral part of my life. My money has never gotten stuck while using it, and it is very easy to use. I feel there should be a new feature added: the transaction history—showing details like amounts received and payments made—should be visible right at the top corner. Thank you.

And along with this, sometimes there is a delay in the notification on the phone, but when the amount is credited, then there is sometimes a delay in the notification.
